name: DallasK
description: '''Dallas James Koehlke''' (born 1993), better known by his stage name '''DallasK''', is an American DJ, record producer, and singer based in Los Angeles. Active since 2010, he co-wrote and produced [[Fifth Harmony|Fifth Harmony's]] 5× platinum single, "[[Work from Home (Fifth Harmony song)|Work From Home]]," as well as their singles "[[Down (Fifth Harmony song)|Down]]" and "He Like That..." off of their self titled album. In addition, Dallas co-wrote and co-produced [[Lauv|Lauv's]] singles "[[Sad Forever]]," and "Breathe" off Lauv's debut album. He has past cuts with [[Tiësto|Tiesto]], [[Chromeo]], [[Krewella]], [[Kshmr|KSHMR]], [[Terror Jr]]. [[Lil Miquela|Miquela]], [[Joel Deleōn]], [[Key (entertainer)|Key]] & [[Stray Kids]]. He is also known for his collaborations with [[Hardwell]] and [[Tiësto]]: "Area 51" and "Show Me" are ranked first and third in the Top 100 on downloading platform [[Beatport]]. He is signed to Amigo Records and has had past releases with Musical Freedom, [[Revealed Recordings]] and [[Ultra Music]].
